barRaise.topFinding: Thirteenth review, and the 06-07 prediction landed: a release shipped after the 06-06 self-heal and the live YaC.json barRaise block is null again, so the writer HIGH is not just at risk of dropping data, it is dropping it right now. Two more releases (0.49.0, 0.50.0) added two more mobile-browser sweeps, two more stylesheets (v12 and v13, taking the cascade to twelve parallel layers), and a sixth mobile-hooks module, while the same three AI-autonomous one-paragraph HIGHs (the writer read-modify-write, the missing Decision 30 body, and the absent N7 basket-coordinate gate) sat untouched for the thirteenth review. The codebase now carries two numbered-file accretion patterns each growing one-per-release: styles-v2 through styles-v13 and mobile-hooks through mobile-hooks-6. The one genuinely good delta is the canonical layer caught up: a fresh 2026-06-08 audit ran and the ROADMAP and launch-checklist version anchors were bumped from 0.42.2 to 0.50.0 in the working tree.
